clusters.justification: These terms map onto predictable salience and limbic network co-activations, representing the overarching macroscopic domain of emotional processing, autonomic arousal, and subjective feeling states.
These concepts reliably co-activate within frontostriatal and dopaminergic reward circuits, driving the high-level computation of incentive, reinforcement, and goal-directed decision-making.

These terms strongly co-activate across core nodes of the default mode network, reflecting the unified macro-level cognitive domain of processing internally constructed representations of oneself and others.
